message:
Merge pull request #1 from prime-radiant-inc/fix/user-feedback-issues

Fix all user feedback issues from first external test

files.patch:
@@ -19,10 +19,8 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     curl \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
-# Install Chrome
-RUN wget -q -O - https://dl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/google-chrome.gpg \
-    && echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/google-chrome.gpg] http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/deb/ stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-chrome.list \
-    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends google-chrome-stable \
+# Install Chromium (multi-arch: works on both amd64 and arm64)
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends chromium \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
 # Install bun
